name: Yellow Cake Mix Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the crunchy peanut butter, 2 eggs, 1/4 cup oil, and 1/3 cup water.
2. Stir in the yellow cake mix until well combined.
3. Fold in the chocolate chips.
4. Drop rounded teaspoons of dough onto an ungreased cookie sheet.
5. Bake at 350 degrees F (175 degrees C) for 10 to 12 minutes, or until lightly golden brown.
5. Remove from oven and let cool on wire rack.
